The Book

The book every founder at breakeven needs to read.

Most founders don't fail from lack of effort. They fail because nobody gave them the right map. This book is the map.

Built from real conversations, real business failures, and the hard-won frameworks that have helped founders across India break through the plateau and start building toward 100 crore.

The 100cr Framework
The exact thinking model for scaling without chaos
Real Case Studies
Founders who crossed breakeven - and what shifted
Leader Identity
Build who you need to become, not just what you need to do
90-Day Playbook
Turn insight into execution - starting Monday

Get early access + launch price.
Be the first to know when it drops.

Notify Me →
Bharathiraja Thangappalam Founder, OriginBI · Author
Who I Am

I've sat across the table from
every kind of stuck founder.

The one who works 14 hours a day and still can't break 5 crore. The one who doubled revenue and lost the culture. The one who hired the wrong person for the most critical role - twice. I've been in those rooms. I've had those conversations.

"Most people don't fail because they lack ambition. They fail because nobody showed them the map."

That's why I built OriginBI - AI that tells you who belongs where before it costs you. That's why I write the 100 Crore Leader every week. That's why I run the Reflect Leadership Workshop — because there are moments when a conversation changes everything.

Founder, OriginBI Author Podcast Host Workshop Facilitator Mentor Leadership Speaker
